prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SPACEGUN-RF300-GRN-KPKO-FBA Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Superhero Galaxy Space Sonic Blaster Toy Lights Sounds - Green Description: Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little one is busy fighting evil galactic villains-after dinner and homework of course-and so, to ensure they're prepared and to keep their imaginative storytelling pretend play running at top speed, they'll need the latest Kidplokio Superhero Galaxy Space Sonic Blaster Toy Gun with lights, sounds and more to ensure victory and a safe journey home.

Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun sonic space blaster is lightweight, enhanced by vibrations, bright lights, and cool blasting sound effects to add all the thrill to their latest mission; the toy gun also features a rotating barrel, lower launching action with lights and spinning, light up cylinder for even more intergalactic fighting fun. And, let's not forget about the fast-action trigger (this is where the magic happens.); upon release, a crazy display of bright lights, accompanied by firing sounds that make saving the day even more fun. Plus, the toy gun comes with batteries included so the fun can start as soon as it comes out of the box.

A great toy to get your kids off the couch and off tablets, cell phones, computers, laptops, and more; the space blaster toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next battle. And, whether it's an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, kids will have a blast indoors or outside with these fun light and sounds toy space blaster guns.

BATTERIES INCLUDED: Yes

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts)

AGE: 3+ Search Terms: boys toy guns toy space blaster galaxy toys super hero kids laser for costumes stocking stuffers action figure pretend play gifts for boys christmas Features: - ULTIMATE GALAXY DEFENDERS GEAR: Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little one is busy fighting evil galactic villains-after dinner and homework of course-and so, to ensure they're prepared and to keep their imaginative storytelling pretend play running at top speed, they'll need the latest Kidplokio Superhero Galaxy Space Sonic Blaster Toy Gun with lights, sounds and more to ensure victory and a safe journey home! - HIGH QUALITY SOUNDS & LIGHTS: Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun sonic space blaster is lightweight, enhanced by vibrations, bright lights and cool blasting sound effects to add all the thrill to their latest mission; the toy gun also features a rotating barrel, lower launching action with lights and spinning, light up cylinder for even more intergalactic fighting fun - FAST-ACTION TRIGGER: This is where the magic happens; when kids pull the fast-action trigger, the fun begins! Upon release, a crazy display of bright lights, accompanied by firing sounds that make saving the day even more fun; the toy gun comes with batteries included so the fun can start as soon as it comes out of the box - SCREEN-FREE FUN: A great toy to get your kids off the couch and off tablets, cell phones, computers, laptops and more; the space blaster toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next battle; and, whether its an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, kids will have a blast indoors or outside with these fun light and sounds toy space blaster guns - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: (?); Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Batteries: Included; Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
